data.body:
=== HOUSEKEEPING: relocated experiment/probe artifacts to a labeled dir; full criteria list in the epic ===

(1) Moved the plan-review experiment/probe artifacts out of the mislabeled docs/experiments/data/ into a clearly
labeled structure: docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/{harnesses/ (.py runners + analysis + check_registry_coverage),
runs/ (*.jsonl + intermediate json), criteria/ (criteria_v*.json + dso-criteria-specs.md)} + a README that states
plainly these are exploratory experiment/probe artifacts — NOT automated tests (pytest collects only tests/) and
NOT production code (that's src/rebar). The completeness guard moved with them and still PASSES from the new path.
Report .md references + the epic's artifact paths updated; the only remaining 'data/' strings are inside raw .jsonl
run captures (model-generated finding text — historical record, left as-is).

(2) Verified + ensured epic 5fd2 carries the FULL AUTHORITATIVE criteria list: added a '## Criteria registry
(authoritative full set — v4 §5; canonical)' section enumerating all 35 — DET P1-P7; Layer-2 F1/F4/E1/E2/E3/E5/E6/
G5/G1+G2/E4/A1/G3/G4; overlays T1/T2/T3/T4/T5a-e/T6/T7/T8/T9; cross-cutting COH/BROAD — with a pointer to the
completeness guard. A programmatic check confirms all 35 ids are present in the epic description. Epic still passes
check_ac + clarity 7.
